summary_en: 4,172,361 shares cancelled under Companies Act Article 178 on 29 May 2026. Post-cancellation issued shares: 50,000,000.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Sakata Inx Corporation completed the cancellation of 4,172,361 treasury shares on 29 May 2026, pursuant to a board resolution dated 11 May 2026 and under the authority of Companies Act Article 178. The cancelled shares represented common stock of the company. Following the cancellation, total issued shares stand at 50,000,000.
